generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our over-reliance on foreign tech puts our national security at risk. The recent cyber-attacks on our infrastructure prove we need to invest in homegrown solutions. Some politicians say we can't afford it, but how much will it cost when we're left vulnerable? Our allies are stepping up - it's time we do the same. #StrongerTogether #NationalSecurity
